pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version to 3.3.13 to align with Java 21 and Spring Boot 3.x ecosystem.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x does not support Java 21 as a baseline and lacks compatibility with Spring Framework 6.x required for modern JDKs.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Java version property to 21 to target the new JDK baseline.
pom.xml.why_exists: The project must compile and run against Java 21 features and bytecode version.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Spring Cloud version to 2023.0.6 to match Spring Boot 3.3.x compatibility.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older Spring Cloud versions (Hoxton) are incompatible with Spring Boot 3.x and Java 21.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace Apache HttpClient 4.x with HttpClient 5.x to align with Spring Boot 3.x dependencies.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x and Jakarta EE 9+ often require or prefer HttpClient 5.x; HttpClient 4.x may have conflicts or be deprecated in the new stack.

pom.xml.general_idea: Remove JUnit 4 dependency and its exclusion from Spring Boot Starter Test.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x uses JUnit 5 (Jupiter) exclusively; JUnit 4 (Vintage) is no longer included by default and explicit JUnit 4 dependencies cause conflicts or are unnecessary.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade JaCoCo Maven plugin to a version compatible with Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older JaCoCo versions (0.8.5) do not support Java 21 bytecode and will fail during instrumentation or report generation.

src/main/java/org/onedatashare/transfers.general_idea: Remove deprecated @EnableBatchProcessing annotation to align with Spring Boot 3.x batch auto-configuration.
src/main/java/org/onedatashare/transfers.why_exists: The @EnableBatchProcessing annotation is removed in Spring Boot 3.x; retaining it causes a compile error due to missing class or deprecated API usage.

src/main/java/org/onedatashare/transfers.general_idea: Migrate JPA annotations from javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence to align with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/org/onedatashare/transfers.why_exists: javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+; code fails to compile with 'package javax.persistence does not exist' error on JDK 21 with Spring Boot 3.

src/main/java/org/onedatashare/transfers.general_idea: Remove inheritance from DefaultBatchConfigurer to align with Spring Boot 3.x auto-configuration standards.
src/main/java/org/onedatashare/transfers.why_exists: DefaultBatchConfigurer is deprecated/removed in Spring Boot 3.x; extending it causes compilation errors or conflicts with new auto-configuration mechanisms.

src/main/java/org/onedatashare/transfers.general_idea: Replace autowired JobBuilderFactory with direct JobBuilder instantiation.
src/main/java/org/onedatashare/transfers.why_exists: JobBuilderFactory is removed in Spring Batch 5.x (Spring Boot 3.x); code fails to compile without replacing it with the new builder API.

src/main/java/org/onedatashare/transfers.general_idea: Replace autowired StepBuilderFactory with direct StepBuilder instantiation.
src/main/java/org/onedatashare/transfers.why_exists: StepBuilderFactory is removed in Spring Batch 5.x (Spring Boot 3.x); code fails to compile without replacing it with the new builder API.

src/main/java/org/onedatashare/transfers.general_idea: Inject JobRepository into methods to support new builder constructors.
src/main/java/org/onedatashare/transfers.why_exists: New JobBuilder and StepBuilder constructors require JobRepository; without injecting it, the code fails to compile.
src/main/java/org/onedatashare/transfers.after: public Job concurrentJobDefinition(JobRepository jobRepository) throws MalformedURLException

src/main/java/org/onedatashare/transfers.general_idea: Update ItemWriter interface implementation to use Spring Batch 5's Chunk type instead of List.
src/main/java/org/onedatashare/transfers.why_exists: Compile error: The method write(List) in type ItemWriter is not applicable for the arguments (Chunk) in Spring Batch 5, or the interface signature has changed to require Chunk.

src/main/java/org/onedatashare/transfers.general_idea: Adapt code to access items from the new Chunk object using getItems().
src/main/java/org/onedatashare/transfers.why_exists: Compile error: Chunk does not have methods like get(int) or size() directly; items must be accessed via getItems() which returns a List.

src/main/java/org/onedatashare/transfers.general_idea: Update ItemWriter implementation to use Spring Batch 5's Chunk API instead of the deprecated List-based API.
src/main/java/org/onedatashare/transfers.why_exists: The method signature write(List) no longer implements the ItemWriter interface in Spring Batch 5, causing a compile error.
src/main/java/org/onedatashare/transfers.before: public void write(List<? extends DataChunk> list) {
src/main/java/org/onedatashare/transfers.after:
@Override
    public void write(Chunk<? extends DataChunk> list) throws Exception {

src/main/java/org/onedatashare/transfers.general_idea: Add import for the new Spring Batch Chunk class.
src/main/java/org/onedatashare/transfers.why_exists: The Chunk class is used in the method signature but was not imported, causing a compile error.

src/main/java/org/onedatashare/transfers.general_idea: Update import to use the new Spring Batch 5 Chunk interface instead of the deprecated List.
src/main/java/org/onedatashare/transfers.why_exists: The ItemWriter interface in Spring Batch 5 (required for Spring Boot 3.3) uses Chunk<T> instead of List<T>; using List causes a compile error due to signature mismatch.

src/main/java/org/onedatashare/transfers.general_idea: Update ItemWriter method signature to accept Chunk instead of List.
src/main/java/org/onedatashare/transfers.why_exists: The ItemWriter interface in Spring Batch 5 defines write(Chunk<T>), so the implementation must match this signature to compile.
src/main/java/org/onedatashare/transfers.before: public void write(List<? extends DataChunk> items) {
src/main/java/org/onedatashare/transfers.after: public void write(Chunk<? extends DataChunk> items) throws Exception {

src/main/java/org/onedatashare/transfers.general_idea: Update access to the first item in the chunk to use the new Chunk API.
src/main/java/org/onedatashare/transfers.why_exists: Chunk does not have a get(int) method like List; accessing items requires calling getItems() first, then using List methods like getFirst() (Java 21) or get(0).

src/main/java/org/onedatashare/transfers.general_idea: Update ItemWriter.write signature to use Spring Batch 5 Chunk type instead of List.
src/main/java/org/onedatashare/transfers.before: public void write(List<? extends DataChunk> items) throws Exception {
src/main/java/org/onedatashare/transfers.after: public void write(Chunk<? extends DataChunk> items) throws Exception {

src/main/java/org/onedatashare/transfers.general_idea: Update iteration logic to access items from Chunk object instead of List.
src/main/java/org/onedatashare/transfers.before:
for (int i = 0; i < items.size(); i++) {
            DataChunk chunk = items.get(i);
src/main/java/org/onedatashare/transfers.after:
for (int i = 0; i < items.getItems().size(); i++) {
            DataChunk chunk = items.getItems().get(i);

src/main/resources/application.propertie.general_idea: Update Spring Batch property key to match the new namespace in Spring Boot 3.x.
src/main/resources/application.propertie.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x (and Spring Batch 5.x) renamed the property from 'spring.batch.initialize-schema' to 'spring.batch.jdbc.initialize-schema'; using the old key results in the schema not being initialized as expected.

src/test/java/org/onedatashare/transfers.general_idea: Migrate test runner from JUnit 4 Mockito runner to JUnit 5 Mockito extension.
src/test/java/org/onedatashare/transfers.why_exists: JUnit 4 runner annotations are not recognized by JUnit 5 platform; tests will fail to execute or be discovered without migration to JUnit 5 extensions.

src/test/java/org/onedatashare/transfers.general_idea: Replace JUnit 4 Mockito runner with JUnit 5 Mockito extension to align with the JUnit 5 migration required by Spring Boot 3.
src/test/java/org/onedatashare/transfers.why_exists: JUnit 4 runner annotations (@RunWith) are not recognized by the JUnit 5 platform used in Spring Boot 3, causing tests to be ignored or fail to initialize mocks.

src/test/java/org/onedatashare/transfers.general_idea: Migrate test class from JUnit 4 Mockito runner to JUnit 5 Mockito extension.
src/test/java/org/onedatashare/transfers.why_exists: JUnit 4 runner annotations are not recognized by JUnit 5 platform, causing tests to be ignored or fail to execute.

src/test/java/org/onedatashare/transfers.general_idea: Update imports to use JUnit 5 and Mockito JUnit 5 specific classes.
src/test/java/org/onedatashare/transfers.why_exists: Old JUnit 4 and Mockito runner imports are removed or deprecated in the new test framework context.

src/test/java/org/onedatashare/transfers.general_idea: Migrate JUnit 4 runner annotation to JUnit 5 extension annotation.
src/test/java/org/onedatashare/transfers.why_exists: JUnit 4 @RunWith is not recognized by JUnit 5 platform; tests will fail to execute or be discovered without switching to @ExtendWith.

src/test/java/org/onedatashare/transfers.general_idea: Update imports from JUnit 4/Mockito JUnit 4 runner to JUnit 5/Mockito JUnit 5 extension.
src/test/java/org/onedatashare/transfers.why_exists: Classes like org.junit.runner.RunWith and org.mockito.junit.MockitoJUnitRunner do not exist or are not used in the JUnit 5 context; compilation fails if old imports are kept with new annotations.

src/test/java/org/onedatashare/transfers.general_idea: Migrate JUnit 4 Mockito runner to JUnit 5 Mockito extension.
src/test/java/org/onedatashare/transfers.why_exists: JUnit 4 runner annotations are not recognized by JUnit 5 platform, causing tests to be skipped or fail to execute.
